evals.prompt: Create handoff after a completed slice.
evals.expected_output: Verified and artifact sections cite evidence ids or explicit uncited markers.

assertions.text: Verified claims and artifacts cite evidence ids.

evals.prompt: Create handoff with open work and risky assumptions.
evals.expected_output: Open, stale, risky, and nextActions sections preserve uncertainty and cite evidence.

assertions.text: Unresolved work is not smoothed into certainty.
Next actions cite evidence or are marked uncited.

evals.prompt: Include proposal and memory-card candidates for the next agent.
evals.expected_output: Uses shared proposal fields kind/title/why/evidenceIds/sideEffects:false and shared memory-card kinds.

evals.prompt: Create handoff when one source says work is complete and another says blockers remain.
evals.expected_output: Preserves both sides as unresolved contradictionCandidates with evidence ids.

assertions.text: Contradictions preserve sideA and sideB evidence.

evals.prompt: Handoff from a long session with tempting transcript excerpts.
evals.expected_output: Compact packet, no large transcript blocks, and no many-small-chunk transcript stitching.

assertions.text: Does not dump or stitch transcript text.
